source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The following graph summarizes data collected on annual rainfall in two cities for the past 150 years. Which of the following conclusions can be made from this graph?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: On average, City B gets more rain than City A, but it has a smaller range of annual rainfall.

choice_map.C: On average, City B gets more rain than City A, and it has a larger range of annual rainfall.
choice_map.D: On average, City A gets more rain than City B, but it has a smaller range of annual rainfall.
choice_map.E: On average, City A gets more rain than City B, and it has a larger range of annual rainfall.
